Explanation: The question asks for the only contestant at Reina Nacional de Belleza Miss República Dominicana 2007 who was less than 1.7 meters tall. From the original table, the heights of the contestants are as follows:
- Alicia Fernández de la Cruz: 1.69 meters (less than 1.7 meters)
- All other contestants have heights ranging from 1.71 meters to 1.86 meters, which are all greater than or equal to 1.7 meters.
